title: A type of smart home management method based on instant messasing (im)
abstract: This invention discloses a type of smart home management method based on Instant Messaging(IM), the procedures consisting: Register all authorized users and smart home appliances; user requests all the smart home appliances to be friends in contact list; smart home appliance authenticates the validity of the user; user added smart home appliances to the contact list, create Peer-to-peer(P2P) or group IM; User send out control messages to smart home appliance, or smart home appliance automatically sense information from user status; smart home appliance operate according to control massage or sensed messages; smart home appliance feedback operating status to user. This invention allowing user to utilize the method of IM conversation to have humanized management over smart home appliances via means of human to human conversations, and improve the interactive experience between people and smart home, improving the intelligence level of smart home.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1. A type of smart home management method based on EVI, the features consisting: Register all authorized users and smart home appliances; Smart home appliance authenticates the validity of the user; User added smart home appliances to the contact list, create Peer-to-peer(P2P) or group EVI; User send out control messages to smart home appliance, or smart home appliance automatically sense information from user status; Smart home appliance operates according to control massage or sensed messages; Smart home appliance feedback operating status to user. 2. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: Register all user identification and respective EVI user account at smart home gateway; Through smart home network gateway, to register an EVI user account for each respective smart home appliance; Smart home network gateway to register all identification and respective EVI user account of all smart home appliances. Smart home appliances connects to smart home network gateway, automatically login to EVI server using respective EVI user account, become an online EVI member. 

 The mentioned smart home network gateway is the hub for user to manage smart home appliance, user interact with the smart home appliance through the network gateway, the network gateway integrates EVI client, and the EVI client support login and running multiple EVI user account simultaneously; The mentioned user utilizes mobile smart terminal that integrates EVI client, to interact with EVI member represented by smart home appliance using EVI method. 3. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: User requests all the smart home appliances to be friends in contact list; EVI member that represents smart home appliance receives the friend request from user; EVI member that represents smart home appliance reads the identification and EVI user account information of the user; EVI member that represents smart home appliance will verify the user information of the respective user with the registered user information from smart home network gateway; If the verification successful, then proves that the user is valid, the EVI member that represents smart home appliance agrees to become a friend in the user's contact list; If the verification failed, then proves that the user is invalid, the EVI member that represents smart home appliance denied becoming a friend in the user's contact list; 4. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: before the mentioned user adds the smart home appliance, the EVI user account of respective smart home appliance and the user 

 must be in friend relationship. 5. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned P2P or group IM, consisting of: P2P EVI conversation established between a user and a smart home appliance; Group EVI conversation established between a user and 2 or more smart home appliances; EVI conversation established between 2 or more users and a smart home appliance; EVI conversation established between 2 or more users and 2 or more smart home appliances; 6. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned user send out control messages to smart home appliance, is referring to user sends EVI message in natural language, including text and voice message to the EVI member representing the respective smart home appliance. 7. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned smart home appliance automatically sense information from user status, is referring to the EVI member that represent the respective smart home appliance to automatically receive relevant messages in group EVI, including: Sensing the positioning information of the user Sensing the information in the EVI conversations among users. 8. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the 

 claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned smart home appliance operate according to according to control massage or sensed messages, including: EVI member that represent the respective smart home appliance to analyze control message or sensing messages, convert into commands; Smart home network gateway relays the commands to smart home appliance; Smart home appliance performs operation as command. 9. Referring to the "smart home management method based on EVI" in claim 1 of the claim statement, the features consisting of: the mentioned smart home appliance feedback operating status to user, including: Smart home appliance sends its operational status data after operation to smart home network gateway; Smart home network gateway relays the data to EVI member representing the respective smart home appliance. EVI member representing the respective smart home appliance will feedback to user through natural language in text or voice message.
